ddls:
CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget */,
  "discretionary" REAL /* Discretionary outlays for the year */,
  "programmatic_outlays" REAL /* Programmatic outlays for the year */,
  "offsetting_receipts" REAL /* Offsetting receipts for the year */,
  "net_interest" REAL /* Net interest for the year */,
  "total" REAL /* Total budget for the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the budget entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the budget entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlays" (
  "outlay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlay category */,
  "outlay_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlay category (e.g., Discretionary, Programmatic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outlay category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outlay category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outlay category was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the outlay category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the outlay category */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the outlay category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_outlays" (
  "budget_outlay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget-outlay entry */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget entry */,
  "outlay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlay category */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the outlay for the budget entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget-outlay entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget-outlay entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the budget-outlay entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the budget-outlay entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_outlay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_outlays_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_outlays_outlay_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlay_id") REFERENCES outlays ("outlay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt entry */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget entry */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the offsetting receipt for the budget entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the receipt entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the receipt entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the receipt entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the receipt entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest entry */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget entry */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of net interest for the budget entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interest entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interest entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the interest entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the interest entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
